idea-plugin.name: Blok Workflow Support
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Blok workflow JSON files via the Blok LSP server.

Features

  • Diagnostics and validation for workflow JSON files
  • Auto-completion for workflow keys, trigger types, and node references
  • Hover documentation for workflow elements
  • Go-to-definition for node references

Requirements

  • The blok-lsp binary must be available on your PATH
  • Install via: npm install -g @blok/lsp-server

server.name: Blok LSP
server.description: Provides language support for Blok workflow JSON files.
